calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Murray for and with Paul Morse (Executor).

Mr. Murray stated that the Executor hired Family members and other Laborers to do repairs on the house, that the Executor disclosed the relationships, that it is permissible and that the four Beneficiaries were all aware of what was done to the house. Mr. Murray also stated that there has not been any estate tax paid, that they were told by the Accountant that no estate tax is due, that he filed a supplement regarding the taxes, that there is a need for a reserve for preparation of K-1's after December 31, 2013 for sale of the Prague Street property and that there will be a need to report it the IRS. Furthermore, Mr. Murray stated that that the house was sold in November 2012 (one year ago), that it is his understanding that it will be realized at close of the estate and distribution, that the coins were not located, that his Client never found them, that if located they will go to Patricia Acosta, that the ring was not located, that the ring would have gone to Carolyn, that Carolyn has passed away, and that if located the ring will go to Patricia which is okay with Crystal (Daughter of Carolyn), and that detailed time regarding extraordinary fees is in the declaration. The Court approved the Petition for Final Distribution (subject to review and modification of the order). The Court will strike language regarding the taxes from the order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)


Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
